---
title: "Home"
---

<div class="hero">

<div class="hero-text">

<p class="eyebrow">Mathematician</p>

# Karol Bolbotowski

<p class="subtitle">
I am a mathematician interested in <strong>[your area 1]</strong>,
<strong>[your area 2]</strong>, and <strong>[your area 3]</strong>.
</p>

<div class="button-row">
<a class="button primary" href="publications.qmd">Publications</a>
<a class="button" href="research.qmd">Research</a>
<a class="button" href="cv.qmd">CV</a>
<a class="button" href="mailto:karol.bolbotowski@pw.edu.pl">Email</a>
</div>

</div>

<div class="hero-card">

## Contact

**Karol Bolbotowski**  
Warsaw University of Technology  

[karol.bolbotowski@pw.edu.pl](mailto:karol.bolbotowski@pw.edu.pl)

<br>

## Links

[Google Scholar](#)  
[ORCID](#)  
[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/search/math?searchtype=author&query=Bolbotowski%2C+K)  
[GitHub](https://github.com/kbolbotowski)

</div>

</div>

<div class="homepage-grid">

<section class="card">

## Research interests

- [Research topic 1]
- [Research topic 2]
- [Research topic 3]
- [Research topic 4]

</section>

<section class="card">

## News

- **June 2026:** Website launched.
- **[Month Year]:** Add recent paper, talk, course, or conference item.
- **[Month Year]:** Add another update here.

</section>

</div>

<section class="wide-card">

## Selected publications

1. **Karol Bolbotowski**, *Title of preprint*, arXiv:XXXX.XXXXX, 2026.  
   [arXiv](#) · [PDF](#)

2. **Karol Bolbotowski**, Coauthor, *Title of article*, Journal Name, volume, pages, year.  
   [DOI](#) · [arXiv](#) · [PDF](#)

See the full [publications page](publications.qmd).

</section>
